final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, lokalid, oppdateringsdato, opphav, vannstandovernn2000, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838),25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, representasjonspunkt, omrade FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: aggregate
-- source_step: 4
-- aggregation_type: "min"
-- group_by: ["teigid"]
-- metric_column: "objid"
-- metric_as: "min_objid"

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and bounding box

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons within Kristiansand extent (prefilter by bbox from step 1)

3.description: get parcels (teig) in Kristiansand by kommunenummer

4.description: find parcels that intersect 200-year storm-surge polygons

5.description: collapse to one row per teig and keep identifying attributes

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS minx, ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS miny, ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxx, ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS maxy, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, lokalid, oppdateringsdato, opphav, vannstandovernn2000, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838),25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, lagretberegnetareal, representasjonspunkt, omrade FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 2
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: aggregate
-- source_step: 4
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- group_by: ["teigid"]
-- metric_as: "count"
